synopsis: The Standing Judicial Commission declined to adjudicate a reference from Central Carolina Presbytery regarding complaints by William A. Conrad against the Interim Session of Prosperity Presbyterian Church. The panel found that additional related complaints had been lodged that were not formally referred to the Commission, and adjudicating the referred matters would render these additional complaints moot without giving them proper consideration under BCO 41-5. The case was referred back to the Central Carolina Presbytery.
